title: Set up two-factor verification
description: Admin policy requires TOTP before sign-in is complete. Scan the QR with any TOTP authenticator (Google / Microsoft / 1Password, etc.) and enter the 6-digit code to finish setup.
recoveryWarningBody: Each of the 10 codes below can be used once if you lose your authenticator. They will not be shown again after this page is closed.
confirmCodeLabel: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator
